Social Media Monitor

Social Media Monitor

Connect Social Platform

Connect a Social Platform
Choose a social media platform to connect for monitoring and engagement.
Facebook

Connect your Facebook page to monitor and respond to comments directly.

Instagram

Connect your Instagram business account to monitor and respond to comments.

YouTube

Connect your YouTube channel to monitor and respond to video comments.

Twitter

Connect your X (Twitter) account to monitor and respond to mentions and replies.

LinkedIn

Connect your LinkedIn company page to monitor and respond to post comments.
